# Awesome OLAP

> A curated list of OLAP databases, data engineering tools, columnar databases, data lake and lakehouse frameworks — 100+ tools across 20+ categories, for data engineers.

## What is this?

Awesome OLAP is an open-source reference list maintained by Samuel Berthe. It tracks the OLAP and analytical data engineering ecosystem: databases, query engines, storage formats, table formats, ETL tools, schedulers, BI tools, and more.

OLAP (Online Analytical Processing) refers to databases and query engines optimized for complex, read-heavy analytical queries over large datasets. Unlike OLTP systems, OLAP databases use columnar storage, vectorized execution, and distributed processing to aggregate and analyze billions of rows in seconds.

## Coverage

- **OLAP Databases** — ClickHouse, Apache Druid, Apache Pinot, StarRocks, Doris, DuckDB, Firebolt, CrateDB, Databend, Byconity, and more
- **Real-time analytics** — sub-second query latency databases
- **Search engines** — Elasticsearch, OpenSearch, Meilisearch, Quickwit, Manticore, Typesense
- **Hybrid OLAP/OLTP (HTAP)** — TiDB, SingleStore, YugabyteDB, CockroachDB
- **Timeseries databases** — InfluxDB, TimescaleDB, QuestDB, TDengine, Prometheus
- **Managed cloud services** — Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Databricks
- **Storage engines** — RocksDB, LSM-tree and B-tree variants
- **Data lake file formats** — Apache Parquet, Apache ORC, Apache Avro, Apache Arrow
- **Open table formats** — Apache Iceberg, Delta Lake, Apache Hudi
- **Metastore** — Apache Hive Metastore, AWS Glue, Nessie, Unity Catalog
- **Object storage** — MinIO, Ceph, SeaweedFS
- **Codecs and compression** — LZ4, Zstandard, Snappy, Brotli, GZIP
- **Brokers and distributed messaging** — Apache Kafka, Apache Pulsar, Redpanda, NATS
- **Stream processing** — Apache Flink, Apache Spark Streaming, Bytewax
- **Batch processing** — Apache Spark, Apache Beam, Trino, Presto, Dask
- **In-memory processing** — Apache Arrow DataFusion, Polars, pandas, DuckDB
- **Distributed SQL** — Trino, Presto, StarRocks
- **Schedulers** — Apache Airflow, Prefect, Dagster, Mage
- **Durable execution** — Temporal, Conductor
- **ETL, ELT and reverse ETL** — Apache NiFi, Airbyte, Fivetran, dbt, Meltano
- **BI & Visualization** — Apache Superset, Grafana, Metabase, Redash, Lightdash
- **Datasets** — TPC-H, TPC-DS, ClickBench
- **Benchmarks** — ClickBench, TPC-H, TPC-DS comparisons

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/samber/awesome-olap
- Website: https://samber.github.io/awesome-olap/
- GitHub: https://github.com/samber
